76107.subject: Markets tumble on Iran fallout
76107.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC $62,863 (-1.9%) | ETH $1,830 (-2.8%) | SOL $74 (-2.0%)**

* Nasdaq futures [tumble 2%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2078038529418883182?s=20) as overall market reacts to continued Iran war

* Micron sinks [30%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2077735422633930913) from June high as memory stocks slide

* Polygon Labs is [laying off staff](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2077759966786777423) and shifting from blockchain foundation to payments company

* Visa launches a new platform to offer stablecoin services to over [200 million merchants](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077769934151847971)

* a16z linked wallet [sells $6.5M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2078018858817098215?s=20) worth of HYPE as it falls [below $60](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2077935866614268401?s=20)

* Clarity Act does [not have Democrat support](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077882147931615657?s=20) as it is currently written

* Judge orders 25 crypto [account freezes](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2078047617095729507?s=20) tied to LIBRA memecoin

* Citadel [invests $400M](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/16/citadel-securities-invests-usd400-million-in-crypto-com-valuing-exchange-at-usd20-billion) in Crypto.com

* Toly says Nikita Biers “[reign of terror](https://x.com/toly/status/2077520057345908816)” as a Solana advisor is over

* HYPE, Hyperliquid's native token, [drops below $60](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2077935866614268401), per @DegenerateNews.

* Truth Social moves to [sell faster access](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077843063196520633) to President Trump's posts to traders and investors, per @WatcherGuru citing the WSJ.

* The White House says China carried out the largest [election data compromise](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2077922567105736882) in history, spanning years since the 2020 election cycle

* [Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2077536243718541512) releases US citizen, Trump calls it a goodwill gesture.

* US 30-year mortgage rate climbs to [6.55%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2077791507336081893).

* French 30-year bond yield hits its [highest](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2077832103207514617) since the financial cris

Fear and Greed is at
31
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$63K
this morning. Bitcoin dipped slightly overnight after failing to
hold above $64,500 yesterday, retracing toward support as trading
volume thinned into the weekend.

The week is closing on a mix of institutional moves and
political decisions. A trillion-dollar asset manager just
launched a new kind of crypto ETF. The entire Senate aligned on a
single crypto vote. And a hardware wallet maker just drew a clear
line between what AI can and cannot do with your funds.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

T. Rowe Price Just Launched a Multi-Token Crypto ETF

T. Rowe Price entered the crypto ETF market on July 16 with
TKNZ, an actively managed fund holding Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB,
Solana, XRP, and HYPE.

Unlike existing single-token spot ETFs, portfolio managers can
shift allocations based on market conditions and research. The
fund launched with Bitcoin as its largest holding at just over
40%.

What is HYPE's weighting in the TKNZ fund at launch?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/lQiHD7FhxUFTi1AMPcQOAg~~/AAQRxRA~/hZYtRtppAgXy66s-N3-MZuOuLH67lvQBEKiFA65gBrovEP8JX0OyH_sZV8r9GCBi0n0yMgna1hDokR69ezN9zYmkcE9Erp5gt0tigl0gWU6bPbzUruvvJ_MrCuHN3P4HjgmWSnl-qHzEj1okSc-m77UbEU_vTYLBqiLV4R-mHs4~ )
   Ledger Built a Wall Between AI Agents and Your Funds

Ledger released an open-source toolkit on July 16 that defines
exactly what AI

76100.subject: Robinhood Chain Has Distribution. Now It Needs an Economy.
76100.body:
Adrian's DeFi Insights 

Автор: Adrian Pape


Автор: Adrian Pape

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/robinhood-chain-has-distribution-now-needs-economy-adrian-pape-66one?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B8fUaZtFIQIiGRsmHa9bDzw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3kLb-vieYZNck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrortkuo~fn-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrortkuo-fn
  
Hey, it's Adrian, We’re walking into the most relaxing and most valuable phase of a crypto cycle. That roughly three-month window of time capitulation, where nothing seems to happen on the surface but underneath coins are carving out inter-cycle lows and running out of sellers. Think of it like this. Someone hands you the keys to a shop full of antiques and says: browse for a few months, come and go as you please, no rush. I’ll give you 80% off anything in here. That’s what the cycle low offers. When tokens run out of sellers, regardless of the macro events or the stock-market correlation of the week, you get a high-confidence floor. A year out, the downside is minimal, with only a sub-1% chance the whole space disappears. The only reason more people aren’t in here loading up is that it takes patience and guts most don’t have. Let’s get into the broader picture and how to set up for the coming week: ️ ⚡ On today's Episode: 📈 Market Update – Cooler inflation and a surprise liquidity injection are giving risk assets room to breathe, while capital rotates on-chain into tokenized real-world assets. 🔊 Project Updates – Ether fi fundamentals are improving, and Robinhood's new chain put up numbers most L2s never see. What's real, and what's just subsidized. 🐂 Alpha Insights – Bitcoin is pressing against the exact zone that separates another failed bounce from a real structure change. The current state of the market. Market Overview The macro backdrop turned friendlier this month, and Bitcoin is feeling it. US inflation came in well below expectations. Core inflation, the measure that strips out volatile food and energy prices, dropped to 2.6% against an expected 2.8%. Headline inflation surprised too, at 3.5% versus 3.8% expected. Producer prices, what businesses pay before those costs reach consumers, also landed under forecast. A big driver was a sharp fall in energy prices in June, and that help looks temporary. Oil has already climbed back above $80, recovering roughly 20% off its recent low. The renewed oil move is the main threat to an otherwise supportive setup and the Strait of Hormuz crossings are again tending to 0. The low level of US strategic oil reserves could also put additional pressure on prices in the medium term. If the reserves need to be replenished, this will create further demand in an energy market that is alr
